Get the usage report of a terminated scheduler

<Heading id={'request'} as={'h2'} className={'openapi-tabs__heading'} children={'Request'}></Heading>

  parameters={[{ name: 'id', in: 'path', description: 'ID of scheduler to get report for', schema: { type: 'string' }, required: true }]}
